idp_aws_account.description: Injected by ArgoCD/ApplicationSet. Not consumed by the chart.

idp_oidc_provider_url.description: Injected by ArgoCD/ApplicationSet. Not consumed by the chart.

namespace.description: Customer namespace the alerts are scoped to. Defaults to the release namespace (apps-idp folder convention).

interval.description: Evaluation interval for alert rule groups (e.g. `1m`, `30s`).

create.description: Create a dedicated GrafanaFolder. Set to false to reuse an existing one via `folderRef`.

title.description: Folder title shown in Grafana. Defaults to `idp-managed-customer-alerts-<namespace>`.

folderRef.description: Name of an existing GrafanaFolder CR. Only used when `folder.create` is false.

create.description: Create a GrafanaContactPoint for Slack. Set to false when reusing an existing one via `existingReceiverName`.

receiverName.description: Contact point display name used as the routing key (`notificationSettings.receiver`). Defaults to `"Slack - <namespace>"`.

webhookUrl.description: Slack webhook URL. Prefer `webhookSecretRef` over inlining the URL in values.yaml.

webhookSecretRef.description: Reference to a Kubernetes Secret key holding the webhook URL. Takes precedence over `webhookUrl`.

mentionChannel.description: Slack mention strategy applied to every alert.

existingReceiverName.description: Reuse an existing GrafanaContactPoint (e.g. `"Slack - KOA dev"`). When set, no contact point is rendered by this chart.

standardAlerts.description: IDP-managed standard alert set. Each entry can be enabled/disabled independently. PromQL is not customer-overridable by design.

restartThreshold.description: Minimum number of restarts within 5 minutes required to trigger.

selfTest.description: Always-firing self-test alert. Enable temporarily after first deploy to verify end-to-end Slack routing and see the real notification template, then disable.

durationSeconds.description: Minimum duration (seconds) the pod must spend in the target state before the alert fires.
